title: PlanBench Task 1
description: Generate a valid action plan for each PlanBench Task 1 plan-generation prompt using upstream-compatible plan parsing and VAL-based semantic validation.

options.title: All Domains
options.description: Evaluate across the full PlanBench Task 1 released domain mix.

baseline_summary: A placeholder dataset-level solver template that returns no plan for the active PlanBench Task 1 prompt.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher valid-plan rate is better across independently evolved PlanBench Task 1 prompts.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the final plan text for the current PlanBench Task 1 prompt so the upstream text_to_plan parser can extract and semantically validate it against the official instance. You may return either a list[str] with one official-style action line per step or a newline-separated string of official-style action lines. Return natural-language or official object-token action text accepted by PlanBench parsing; do not return parenthesized PDDL. Preserve the declared helper symbols when useful. Do not use browsing or external network access.
